title: Random Advancement Giver
description: Every 10-20 minutes, a random player will receive a random horror themed advancement
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

If you have any complaints, comments, or suggestions, please join the discord server

You DO NOT have to purchase a server, it is just recommended to ensure good server performance since essential mod has bugs and can be very laggy.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Every player who joins a world will have their own 10-20 minute timer. Once the timer ends, they will receive a random horror-themed advancement, the timer will reset, and it will happen again until the player receives all the advancements. Every time a player receives an advancement, a cave noise will be heard as well.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Advancement list:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


He's watching

He's coming

Behind you

Run

Hello???

Hello ??

I hear you

I hate you

Secrets

I see you

Who are you ?

Where are you ?

</details>
